data.content: In src/lib/verification-orchestrator.ts, transitionToRetry now dispatches retry advancement inline by resolveMemoryManagerType(repoPath): knots keeps nextKnot(expectedState=currentState) and beads calls nextBeat(currentState, repoPath). Quality gates in dedicated worktree: bun run lint (warnings-only baseline), bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test (2030 total), NODE_ENV=production bun run build.
